---
title: "scenarios.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\games\odin_protocol\engine\scenarios.py"
loc: 332
complexity: 17
logic_score: 1.13
style_score: 3.42
intel_score: 4.53
overall_score: 1.90
---

## Intent
The `scenarios.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignScenarioEngine, _inject_environmental_modifiers, _transform_pillar_narrative, _calculate_option_difficulty, generate_scenario, _generate_internal, _calculate_affinity, _generate_world_attributes, get_world_att, _generate_cast, _get_or_create_campaign, _generate_item, get_outcome, get_scientist_query. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignScenarioEngine, _inject_environmental_modifiers, _transform_pillar_narrative, _calculate_option_difficulty, generate_scenario, _generate_internal, _calculate_affinity, _generate_world_attributes, get_world_att, _generate_cast, _get_or_create_campaign, _generate_item, get_outcome, get_scientist_query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [hashlib](file://hashlib)
- [math](file://math)
- [random](file://random)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `SovereignScenarioEngine`
- `_inject_environmental_modifiers`
- `_transform_pillar_narrative`
- `_calculate_option_difficulty`
- `generate_scenario`
- `_generate_internal`
- `_calculate_affinity`
- `_generate_world_attributes`
- `get_world_att`
- `_generate_cast`
- `_get_or_create_campaign`
- `_generate_item`
- `get_outcome`
- `get_scientist_query`
